title: Leveraged Buyouts: In a leveraged buyout (LBO), the buyer primarily uses what...
summary: Identify debt as the primary source of financing used in leveraged buyout transactions.
prompt: In a leveraged buyout (LBO), the buyer primarily uses what to finance the acquisition?

options.text: LBOs are characterized by the use of significant amounts of debt to finance the
A formal tender offer to shareholders

solution: LBOs are characterized by the use of significant amounts of debt to finance the acquisition of a company.
